examples: Most people like our beef sizzler.
So where we going, House of pancakes or The Sizzler?
We at Sizzler are committed to providing safe and quality food.
On a particularly slow day, everyone in the office decided to hit the Sizzler.
Samson had to look sharp to push away a flighted effort from home substitute Johnny Russell but was beaten all ends up by Buaben's sizzler on 85 minutes.
